- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type, language, framework, DB, and API requirements are already specified by the user.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Initialized Next.js App Router + Tailwind project structure manually in-place because `create-next-app` rejects the workspace folder name (`ATM Finder`).

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented MySQL schema/trigger scripts, Google API backed Next.js routes, and a responsive premium dark-mode UI with skeletons, expandable cards, live indicator, and report toast.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were specified by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed dependencies and completed successful `npm run build` verification.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Skipped: npm scripts (`dev`, `build`, `start`, `lint`) are already available and sufficient for this workspace.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Launched with `npm run dev` and verified reachable at `http://localhost:3000` (HTTP 200).

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README is present and current, and this file has been cleaned of HTML comments.
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
